idea-plugin.name: X.509 Certificate Viewer
idea-plugin.description:
Inspect X.509 certificates and Java keystores directly inside IntelliJ-based IDEs. Built for certificate-heavy Java, PKI, digital identity, and secure backend workflows.

Supported inputs include PEM, DER, CRT, CER, PKCS#12, JKS, and JCEKS files.

Features:
  • Open supported certificate and keystore files from the Project view.
  • Inspect subject, issuer, serial number, and validity dates.
  • Prompt for keystore passwords when required.
  • Keep local certificate inspection inside the IDE without terminal glue.

This is an inspection tool. It does not replace certificate path validation, revocation checks, WebPKI policy validation, or organizational PKI review.
